hypothesis: If a closed-loop Gaussian-process Bayesian optimizer is used to select bicarbonate temperature, concentration, and flow rate, KOH concentration and flow rate, and applied current density in a reactive carbon electrolyzer, then reactor yield will increase and converge in fewer experiments than random or manual exploration and the optimized conditions will transfer to mixed bicarbonate–carbonate electrolytes, because model-guided acquisition efficiently exploits structure in the performance landscape.
